text: Energy Pedals One provides an introduction for the robotic energy devices, as well as providing an orientation for the foot pedals and their controls. The right hand will have control of scissors, which have the capabilities of doing monopolar cut and coagulation. And you'll see that the screen provides instruction as to which energy modality to apply and when to apply it.

The robotic system's left arm is equipped with a grasper for bipolar cautery, used to grasp the center of a barbell-like object and apply coagulation. The screen interface provides visual feedback on foot pedal positioning, highlighting changes between the left and right arms as the surgeon's foot hovers over the respective pedals.

The video displays various objects appearing randomly, including small spheres designated for monopolar cutting, larger spheres for monopolar coagulation, and barbell-like objects for bipolar coagulation.
